name: SCATTERPLOT MATRIX

meta.form: 3x3 grid of mini scatters, every variable against every other
meta.data_required: exactly 3 measures over up to 30 items; overview before analysis

see_instead.when: one pair is already known to matter

use_when: WARN: analyst overview to pick which pairwise plot deserves a real chart
screening 3 measures for relationships in one glance
not_when: presenting to any non-analyst (36 tiny axes explain nothing)
more than 3 variables in this spec (use small multiples of CH-COR-01)

data_shape.title: action title naming the strongest pair

rules: diagonal cells name the variable and its 0-to-top range
no ticks in cells: this is a screening view, not a reading view
the highlight item is visible in every panel
anti_patterns: WARN ENTRY: a SPLOM is a workbench, not a deliverable; ship CH-COR-01 of the pair that matters
gridlines and ticks in mini cells
